summary: Bootstrap governance PR handling so harness changes can be validated without self-bypass.
rationale: The CI PR governance job intentionally uses the base branch gate by default, but governance migration PRs need an explicit labelled path that also validates the proposed gate before merge.
line_count_rationale: The existing governance gate is already near the production line limit; this bootstrap adds manifest parsing without reshaping the checker in the same policy migration.
verification: uv run ruff check tools/check_pr_governance.py tests/test_pr_governance.py
uv run ty check tools/check_pr_governance.py tests/test_pr_governance.py
risks: Governance bootstrap PRs require the explicit governance-bootstrap label so proposed gates cannot run as an unreviewed default.
